violations.text: Allergy statement was lacking on the menus. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025
The date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Storage guidance provided. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was less than 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. Bottle was replaced. PIC to test sanitizer daily. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025
Dessert reach-in door handle was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025

The cutting board was very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. PIC disposed of cutting board. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap (has air break). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Guidance document provided. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025
The door to the toilet room next to food storage is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025
